Value: Inconsistent text casing on Add to Cart button across product pages

The Add to Cart button displays with different text casing depending on which page the user is on. On the inventory page the button reads Add to cart (lowercase) while on the product detail page it reads Add to Cart (title case). This is a minor but visible UI inconsistency reflecting a lack of uniform styling standards.
2. On the Products page observe the Add to Cart button text under any product card
3. Note the exact casing: Add to cart
4. Click any product name to open its detail page
5. Observe the Add to Cart button text on the detail page
6. Compare casing between the two pages
The Add to Cart button text should be consistent across all pages - either always Add to cart (sentence case) or always Add to Cart (title case).
Inventory page button reads: Add to cart | Product detail page button reads: Add to Cart. Inconsistent casing across the two views.
Applies to all 6 products. Typically caught in a UI design review or style guide audit.
